overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding at high speed through rain-soaked Night City streets at night. The clip features vibrant neon holographic advertisements, futuristic glass architecture, and dynamic weaving through moderate traffic under elevated highways and overpasses.

events.description: passing under elevated overpass with green 'suitays' neon sign visible ahead

concrete highway overpass with support pillars spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle ride through a rain-soaked multi-lane street at night. The rider passes under an elevated highway overpass marked by a prominent green 'suitays' neon sign, with a large pink digital billboard visible on the left. The road is wet with reflections of neon lights, and the rider approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk intersection.

events.description: crossing wide intersection with yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other vehicles
passing blue '24/7 STORE' neon sign on left building facade

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersections and weaving through moderate traffic while maintaining high speed

red neon sign with 'GO BACK' text in stylized font
tall commercial structures with multiple digital billboards and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a wide-open commercial intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks alongside a green sports car. The area features dense digital signage including a blue '24/7 STORE' neon sign and a red 'GO BACK' sign on the left. Pink neon-lit trees appear on the right as the rider navigates through moderate traffic.

following white delivery van closely through covered section

segments.scene_description: The rider enters a semi-covered roadway beneath an elevated highway, transitioning from neon-lit open air to artificial overhead lighting. A blue 'HOTEL' neon sign is visible on the right as the rider follows a white delivery van through the sheltered section, with concrete pillars lining the left side of the road.

passing red 'Capitoline' neon sign mounted on intersection structure

agents.ego_description: overtaking large truck on the left and weaving through moderate traffic density

red neon sign reading 'Capitoline' mounted above intersection
building facade with purple neon lighting and circular architectural features

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered roadway, the rider overtakes a large box truck on the left while navigating through a commercial district. A red 'Capitoline' neon sign marks the intersection ahead, and a distinctive purple-lit building with circular features appears on the right. The rider maintains high speed while maneuvering around the truck.

passing red bull-style neon logo on left building with pink neon accents

segments.scene_description: The final segment features high-speed riding through a wide-open corridor with prominent holographic advertisements. A massive green holographic skull floats above the street center, while a pink neon bull logo illuminates the left building. The rider passes under elevated highway ramps with red underlighting, maintaining high speed through sparse traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride through a rain-soaked urban corridor that opens into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial intersection. It begins by speeding under an elevated highway overpass beneath a green suitays neon sign, with a large pink digital billboard casting a glow over the wet, reflective asphalt. As the rider approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk, the confined space of the overpass gives way to a wide-open intersection. The scene then expands into a dense commercial hub, where the camera glides past a green sports car and a series of blue and red digital signs. Finally, the ride continues through moderate traffic, passing pink neon-lit trees that illuminate the rainy night.

The shot follows a high-speed ride that transitions from a sheltered urban underpass into a wide, neon-saturated commercial corridor. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving from open air into a semi-covered roadway where artificial overhead lights and a blue hotel sign flank the path as the rider follows a delivery van. As the camera exits the sheltered section, the environment opens into a commercial district where the rider overtakes a large box truck, passing a red Capitoline sign and a purple-lit circular building. The scene then expands into a wide-open corridor dominated by massive holographic advertisements, including a floating green skull and a pink neon bull. Finally, the rider maintains high speed through sparse traffic, gliding under elevated highway ramps illuminated by red underlighting.
